Meindert Hobbema

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
A Watermill
by Meindert Hobbema
Dutch Golden Age · 1664
Hobbema's recurring subject: a watermill at the edge of woods, water churning at its wheel, a figure or two small against the trees. The closing grace note of the Dutch landscape school.
←Utagawa Hiroshige Hans Hoffmann→
